pi_items.source: GitHub releases page https://github.com/OS4ED/openSIS-Classic/releases confirms V9.2 is available as a release tag dated 2025-10-30
Confirmed in task.json description, setup_task.sh, direct_db_setup.sh, and setup_opensis.sh login_authentication table insertion

Task.json claims 'admin123' but all environment setup scripts (direct_db_setup.sh line 12, setup_opensis.sh line 327, automate_installer.py, run_installer_http.sh) consistently use 'Admin@123'. This is the actual password set in the login_authentication database table.
setup_task.sh line 19 INSERT statement creates student with first_name='Sample'
setup_task.sh line 19 INSERT statement creates student with last_name='Student'
setup_task.sh line 20 INSERT statement sets date_of_birth='2005-05-15' for Sample Student
setup_task.sh line 20 INSERT statement sets gender='M' for Sample Student
setup_task.sh line 20 INSERT statement sets grade_level='10' for Sample Student
install_opensis.sh lines 79-82 installs 'mariadb-server' and 'mariadb-client'. env.json indicates LAMP stack with MySQL.
install_opensis.sh line 87 installs 'php' without version constraint, default to PHP 8.x in modern Ubuntu
install_opensis.sh lines 127-152 installs google-chrome-stable, setup_task.sh line 30 starts Chrome. env.json includes 'browser' in action types.

pi_items.metadata_value: Sample data created by task setup scripts
pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic - all data created by environment setup scripts
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and direct_db_setup.sh insert all data programmatically. Student record created with INSERT statement. No external data files or real datasets used.
install_opensis.sh line 160 downloads from GitHub OS4ED/openSIS-Classic with URL pattern https://github.com/OS4ED/openSIS-Classic/archive/refs/tags/V9.2.tar.gz
setup_task.sh line 18 and direct_db_setup.sh line 9 use 'opensis_user' for database connection
setup_task.sh line 18 and direct_db_setup.sh line 10 use 'opensis_password_123' for database connection

privileged_info_summary: The search_student task uses OpenSIS v9.2, a verified open-source Student Information System from GitHub (OS4ED/openSIS-Classic). The environment runs on a LAMP stack with Apache 2.4+, MariaDB 10.4+, and PHP 8.x, accessed via Google Chrome. A synthetic student record for 'Sample Student' is created during setup with date_of_birth=2005-05-15, gender=M, and grade_level=10. Critical contradiction: the task description specifies login password 'admin123', but all environment setup scripts configure the actual password as 'Admin@123'. Database credentials are opensis_user / opensis_password_123. All test data is synthetically generated by setup scripts, not from real external sources.
